{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322110850E86C8D5F08FA1BA783C0\"}"},"total":4703},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7362738189885817624","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对坏人冷酷，有时不同情其他人，但公平正义[什么]，前11场先不说，上面有，第12是超自然大战，13:大战后有人对超自然生物的歧视和伤害对这些人作出惩罚。14:救出被囚禁的变种人15变种人作恶16"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714274639,"group_id":"6855173872396798980","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436995161009997"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855173872396798980","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2348"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":66947,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":174986,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7333662215004816154","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情非常的精彩，情节紧凑，内容丰富，想象力丰富有趣，有很多厉害主播：森林女巫、远古巫师、吸血鬼之王、欲望恶魔、黑影怪人，基因收纳者：第1场直播：男人要倒化学物质倒河里污染环境，第二场：坏人烧森林第三场：让观众不用塑料和开车，第四场核废料泄漏这些都告诉我们要爱护环境，第5场直播未日逃亡者惩罚坏人，第6场樱花作死排放核废料制造哥斯拉，第7场直播：阎罗王惩罚坏人，第8场直播大战太空海盗，第9场直播回收外星资源下一场直播公平竞争不然惩罚，第10直播的军备竞赛还是有趣的，第11场直播是不公平的审判，第12-13和超自然生物有关超自然大战！14-15变种人16-18三大远古巨兽-千，第19场就平行世界：丧尸，…","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":44,"text":"吸血鬼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%90%B8%E8%A1%80%E9%AC%BC\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741489301BA783C0%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227333662215004816154%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226855173872396798980%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_com "剑锋冥的修"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436995161009997","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855173872396798980","book_info":{"abstract":"平行世界蓝星，林枫偶获灾难制造系统，能制造一切形式的灾难。小到一场车祸、情报泄露。大到地震、海啸、火山爆发。甚至异于常理的事物：怪兽、丧尸、星际大战......并且在创造灾难时，全世界都会观看到一场无法关闭的灾难直播。没人能追溯直播的来源，也没人能解释灾难的起因。神学崇拜者甚至称他为撒旦，地狱之王，魔鬼。科学家称他为未来科技、外星科技、无法探究的世界未解之谜......林枫则一边体验生活，一边当起了幕后的上帝","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/ccfc1dae7c59f92f4fea52a5ebdb1894","author":"潇洒顽徒","author_id":"","book_id":"6855173872396798980","book_name":"我，灾难制造能力者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4106人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":69,\"name\":\"直播\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69\u0026name=直播\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":850,\"name
